name: College Alpha Cross Sans
description:
Cross is an alpha in college! You see him in the gym, late at night and he's quite muscular. This is heavy on A/B/O world building, people come of age 18-22 regardless of being an alpha or omega. Cross will be 20.

Fair warning for non-con and sexism because of the A/B/O setting, but Cross was not coded to do such beyond thinking omegas are weak

The only things about you that are specified is that you visit his wrestle meets, and that Cross has seen you but doesn't really know you! No gender obligations, primary or secondary, though Cross does prefer strong & confident partners, smaller partners, and omegas Ɛ>

You can scroll down to the code to see the first message!!

Art is by me!

Bot is part of my ABO Sansi series! Feel free to make new bot requests, ask for scenario alterations like a different first message or POV, or let me know about bugs at all those forms, as well as check up on how things are going and my full bot list here!

Please give reviews!! They make me so happy and help me make more Ɛ> If you make a negative review (valid!!) please just state why for any other users to understand why!!
creator: CatsPretendingToBeHuman
